results.rendered_html:
ānumānika a. (kī f.) [ anumānādāgataḥ ṭhak]
1 Relating to a conclusion.
2 Derived from an inference, subject to inference, inferential.
3 Inferred.
— kaṃ The Pradhāna of the Sāṃkhyas; ānumānikamapyekeṣāmiti cenna  Br. Sūt. ; ˚tvaṃ the state of being inferable.
